ppt2pdf.title: PPT to PDF Lossless HD
ppt2pdf.subtitle:
Based on a native document engine, perfectly preserves layout, fonts, and frames.
Completely free, supports up to 20MB.
ppt2pdf.processingHint: Large files may take over ten seconds, please be patient.
ppt2pdf.downloadHint: Your PDF file is now downloading.
ppt2pdf.errNetwork: Network error, please check your connection
ppt2pdf.faq1a: We understand the pain of high-quality document conversion. We built this high-performance conversion node as a free utility to help users, hoping you might also explore our highly cost-effective AI account subscription services.
ppt2pdf.faq2q: Is the conversion safe? Will my files be saved?
ppt2pdf.faq2a: Absolutely safe. We use a stateless underlying document processing engine. Your PPT files are converted purely in memory and are instantly destroyed from the server after processing. We strictly do not store any user data.
ppt2pdf.faq3q: What is native underlying conversion technology?
ppt2pdf.faq3a: Many converters on the market generate PDFs through simple web screenshots, leading to missing fonts and messed-up layouts. We use native underlying APIs (LibreOffice) to ensure your fonts, vector graphics, and original layouts are perfectly preserved 1:1.
